2606.27061.title: How to evaluate clustering with ground truth?
2606.27061.paper_summary: External indexes can be used for cluster evaluation when ground truth is available. We review the most common external validity indexes focusing on set-matching-based measures. We recommend centroid index (CI), because it is an intuitive cluster-level measure with an explainable result. If we need a more fine-tuned, point-level measure, there are more choices. Pair-set index (PSI) provides a normalized score which is not biased by cluster sizes. If all points should matter equally, then clustering accuracy (ACC) or any other set-matching measure is suitable.
2606.27061.paper_summary_zh: 外部指標可以在有真實標準的情況下用於叢集評估。<lb/>我們回顧了最常見的外部有效性指標，重點關注基於集合匹配的度量。<lb/>我們推薦重心指數（CI），因為它是一個直觀的叢集級別度量，並且結果易於解釋。<lb/>如果我們需要更精細的點級度量，則有更多選擇。<lb/>配對集合指數（PSI）提供了一個標準化的分數，不受叢集大小的偏見。<lb/>如果所有點都應該同等重要，那麼叢集準確性（ACC）或任何其他集合匹配度量都是合適的。
2606.27061.author: Pasi Fränti et.al.
